summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard, Audit Logging System, and Crypto Checkout QR code features. Backend: 30/30 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All admin dashboard features working - stats cards, users tab, notaries tab, audit logs tab, pending applications with approve/reject buttons. QR code displays correctly in crypto checkout using qrcode.react.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Role-based access control properly implemented - admin endpoints return 403 for non-admin users
Good: Non-admin users attempting to access /admin are redirected to dashboard with toast notification
Good: Audit logs are being created when admin actions (like user status change) are performed
Good: QR code generation working correctly using QRCodeSVG from qrcode.react
Good: Admin dashboard shows accurate platform statistics from MongoDB aggregations
Good: Pending notary applications displayed with approve/reject functionality
Good: Users tab includes search functionality and view details button
Good: Revenue analytics chart displays crypto payment data correctly
Note: Audit logs collection was empty initially but populated after admin actions were performed during testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing admin and demo users
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Admin Dashboard fully implemented at /admin route with 4 tabs: Overview, Users, Notaries, Audit Logs. 2) Audit logging system creates entries when admin actions are performed - tested via PATCH /api/admin/users/{id}/status which created an audit entry. 3) All admin/audit endpoints require admin role - non-admin users get 403 Forbidden. 4) There is 1 pending notary application from notary_test@example.com that can be approved/rejected. 5) QR code generation in CryptoCheckout uses QRCodeSVG from qrcode.react - generates scannable BTC/ETH QR codes. 6) Platform stats show: 5 users, 0 active notaries, 6 notarizations, $245 revenue, 1 pending app.

admin_stats.notes: Returns total_users, active_users_30d, total_notaries, pending_notary_applications, total_notarizations, completed_notarizations, total_revenue_usd, crypto_payments_count, documents_sealed

admin_users_list.notes: Pagination, search, role/status filtering all work correctly

admin_user_details.notes: Returns user profile, notary profile, recent activity, payments, notarizations

admin_user_status.notes: Can change user status to active/disabled/suspended. Creates audit log entry

admin_notaries_list.notes: Returns all notary profiles with pagination and status filtering

admin_pending_applications.notes: Returns pending notary applications with user details

admin_approve_notary.notes: Endpoint exists and returns 404 for non-existent ID (not 500)

admin_reject_notary.notes: Endpoint exists and returns 404 for non-existent ID

admin_revenue_analytics.notes: Returns stripe_daily, crypto_daily, by_package breakdown for specified period

admin_notarization_analytics.notes: Returns daily counts, by_status, by_document_type breakdown

audit_logs.notes: Pagination works, returns action, resource_type, description, user_email, timestamp

audit_stats.notes: Returns by_action, by_severity, by_resource, daily_activity aggregations

audit_export_json.notes: Exports audit logs as JSON with record_count

audit_export_csv.notes: Exports audit logs as CSV format

admin_access_control.notes: Non-admin users get 403 Forbidden on all admin/audit endpoints

frontend_admin_dashboard.notes: Stats cards, Overview tab, Users tab (with search), Notaries tab, Audit Logs tab all functional

frontend_admin_redirect.notes: Non-admin users are redirected to /dashboard with 'Access Denied' toast

frontend_qr_code.notes: QRCodeSVG from qrcode.react generates real scannable QR codes for crypto payments
